steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says scientists used machine learning tools to study elephant sounds, uncovering a sophisticated communication system. The blank describes what the tools did to unique patterns in the elephants' rumbling sounds. The target meaning is: identify or discover something that was hidden.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices, confirm the match
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘created’: Created means to produce or bring into existence — the tools found pre-existing patterns, they did not manufacture them. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘corrected’: Corrected means to fix errors — the passage describes discovery, not correction of mistakes. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘detected’: Detected means to discover or identify something not immediately obvious, directly matching uncovering in the first sentence. ✓
  • Choice D — ‘scattered’: Scattered means to disperse in different directions — opposite of identifying a structured communication system. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
